query:
SELECT 
  id, campaignId, authorUsername, subreddit, status, matchScore,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000) as discovered_at
FROM outreach_leads
ORDER BY discoveredAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2E9LwDmq6cTgS6X.1f00e7e95180 --database D6eMQgvSZZr9tsyS9zVhzn --execute 
SELECT 
  id, campaignId, authorUsername, subreddit, status, matchScore,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000) as discovered_at
FROM outreach_leads
ORDER BY discoveredAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
